criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Creation
criteria.description: Ability to generate engaging and relevant content, including text, images, and videos, using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: Social Media Management
criteria.description: Capabilities for scheduling posts, managing multiple accounts, and analyzing performance across various social media platforms.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Analytics and Insights
criteria.description: Provides data-driven recommendations and insights using AI to optimize social media strategies and improve engagement.

criteria.name: Automation of Tasks
criteria.description: Automates repetitive tasks such as content posting, hashtag optimization, and responding to customer inquiries.

criteria.name: Personalized User Experience
criteria.description: Offers a tailored experience for users, including AI-driven conversations and content recommendations.
